font-family.$description: Font family for P elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-size.$description: Font size for P elements — M3 body-large (16px).

font-weight.$description: Font weight for P elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

line-height.$description: Line height for P elements — M3 body-large (24/16).

letter-spacing.$description: Tracking for P — M3 body-large (0.5px) positive tracking.

measure.$description: Maximum width for P elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

spacing-before.$description: Amount of margin block start for P elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

spacing-after.$description: Amount of margin block end for P elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

color.$description: Color of P elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-style.$description: Font style for P elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

text-transform.$description: Text transform for P elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.
